hero.subtitle: At Rijschool Lovanium in Leuven, experienced instructors guide you step by step. Personal, patient, and at your own pace.

testimonials.name: Tibeau Reynaerts
testimonials.text: Gert immediately created a stress-free environment. Thanks to his approach I passed my driving exam. Absolutely recommended!

testimonials.name: Hanna Myklebust
testimonials.text: I learned a lot from the very first lesson. The stress literally fell off my shoulders. Flexible scheduling is a great plus.

testimonials.name: Pauline Marbaix
testimonials.text: The positive feedback approach and insights into road safety and car mechanics make Rijschool Lovanium unique. Great experience!

testimonials.name: Noémie Kamdem
testimonials.text: Thanks to the calm approach and efficient planning by email, I felt comfortable right away. Passed on the first attempt!

testimonials.name: Adinda Van Bé
testimonials.text: At Lovanium they are super friendly, they put you at ease and we don't only drive in Leuven but also on the motorway. Super!

testimonials.name: Si-Yuan Shen
testimonials.text: Gert and Hugo are both really great driving instructors. They are professional and give really good cues to teach me how to drive correctly and safely.

testimonials.name: Steffi Mercie
testimonials.text: Gert is a very calm and structured driving instructor. He gives clear explanations and helps you step by step. Very satisfied!

services.headline: Everything for your category B license
services.subtitle: From the first traffic rule to the driving exam — we guide you through every part of your training.

items.title: Theory Course
items.description: Pass your theory exam on the first try. Our 12-hour interactive course fully prepares you for the official traffic exam in Leuven.

items.title: Driving Lessons
items.description: Get safely on the road with an experienced instructor. Drive in a modern Audi with dual controls — manual or automatic transmission.

items.title: Refresher Session
items.description: Already licensed but want to refresh your skills? Our refresher session is ideal for new drivers who want to build confidence.

whyUs.headline: What makes us different
whyUs.subtitle: More than a driving school. We invest in your success — with specializations you won't find anywhere else.

items.title: Central in Leuven
items.description: Located in the Regus business center at Martelarenplein 20E — next to the train station, bus stops and kiss & ride zone.

items.title: Driving anxiety specialist
items.description: Our instructors are specialized in guiding students with driving anxiety, ADHD, ADD and learning disabilities.

items.title: Premium Audi fleet
items.description: Drive in a modern Audi with the latest safety technology. Both manual and automatic transmissions available.

items.title: Government accredited
items.description: Rijschool Lovanium is accredited by the Federal Government with recognition number 2863. Fully certified instructors.

items.title: Short waiting times
items.description: No months of waiting. We schedule your lessons quickly so you can start as soon as possible.

items.title: Available via WhatsApp
items.description: Easy contact via WhatsApp at +32 492 48 28 53. Quick responses, personal service.

pricing.headline: Clear prices, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: All prices include VAT. Transparent and fair.
pricing.note: All prices include VAT. Registration fee (€35) is one-time only. Exam fees charged by the exam center are not included.

packages.name: Registration
packages.description: One-time registration at Rijschool Lovanium. Required for new students.

packages.name: Theory Course
packages.description: Complete 12-hour theory course. Recommended for those who want to pass on the first attempt.

packages.name: Driving Lesson
packages.description: Individual driving lesson with a certified instructor in a modern Audi.

team.headline: The people behind the wheel
team.subtitle: Our team of certified instructors is ready to guide you. With specializations in driving anxiety, ADHD and learning disabilities, we offer a tailored approach for every student.

members.name: Gert
members.bio: As founder and director, Gert leads Rijschool Lovanium. He combines his passion for education with an in-depth knowledge of road safety.

members.name: Hugo
members.bio: With over 9 years of experience, Hugo has guided hundreds of students to their license. Known for his calm, structured approach.

members.name: Sandra
members.bio: Sandra brings over 3 years of experience and specializes in guiding students with ADHD and autism. She also conducts refresher sessions.

members.name: Edward
members.bio: Edward has over 12 years of experience in driving instruction. He also leads refresher and training sessions for license holders.

members.name: Joris
members.bio: With 12+ years of experience, Joris is one of our most experienced instructors. He also manages theory and school license programs.

members.name: Johan
members.bio: Johan has over 10 years of experience as a driving instructor, guiding students with special attention to driving anxiety and eco-driving.

members.name: Ludo
members.bio: Ludo is our enthusiastic newcomer with a background in first aid. He brings a fresh perspective and plenty of motivation to his lessons.

team.vacancyTitle: Join the team at Rijschool Lovanium
team.vacancyText: We are looking for a new driving instructor. Send your CV and motivation letter to info@rijschoollovanium.be.

booking.headline: Ready to start?
booking.subtitle: Send us a message and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Ask a question or tell us something about yourself...
form.successText: We will contact you as soon as possible. See you at Rijschool Lovanium!
form.errorText: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.

contactInfo.title: Direct contact
contactInfo.addressNote: Regus business center · Next to the station

footer.description: Accredited driving school in Leuven (license #2863). Theory lessons, driving lessons and refresher sessions. Specialized in driving anxiety, ADHD and learning disabilities.
footer.recognition: Accredited by the Federal Government · Recognition number 2863
